title: hieracium praealtum subsp. obscurum
intro: Hieracium praealtum subsp. obscurum, also known as the Lesser Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is said to possess various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Lesser Hawkweed is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
